onenote.name: OneNote
onenote.desc: OneNote desktop (free) -- installs, removes tray icon, disables OneDrive autostart

fallbackDownload.notes: Replaces the deprecated Win10 standalone (LinkID=2024522). This URL pulls the current Microsoft 365 OneNote desktop app via Click-to-Run -- the only OneNote variant Microsoft is shipping going forward (Win10 OneNote sunset).
